form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into ninth behind Ghostly Casper at this track over 1609m on April 5 at $4. Raced better the start before that with a good run when 3rd over 1609m at this track was 4th- at the bell, beaten 3.5 m by Willys Home Run (1:54.00) in 4yo on March 29 at $2.10. Very hard to beat from the inside draw.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 4 m fifth behind Passarino at this track over 1609m 4yo last start. Before that was beaten 3 metres second again at this track in on March 27. Racing well and worth each-way consideration.

form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 4 m finishing third behind Kevin Anthony at this track over 1609m on March 27 at $10.30. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.0 m finishing second behind Bella Cavalla at this track over 1609m on April 3 at $6.70. Perfectly placed to win.

formComments.comment: Fair performance when beaten by 4 m finishing third behind Kevin Anthony at this track over 1609m on March 27 at $10.30. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.0 m finishing second behind Bella Cavalla at this track over 1609m on April 3 at $6.70. Perfectly placed to win.

form.formComment: Has been racing well this preparation and showed plenty of improvement following March 26 run. Just managed to hang on and win won by a 0.8 m as favourite at Flamboro Downs (2:00.30) beating Hesohot Hanover in on April 2 at $1.65. This race will be harder than that win. Better placed in something easier.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 7th over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 6th- beaten 4 m by Passarino (1:55.20) in 4yo on April 5 at $15.55. Before that 4th over 1609m at Western Fair Raceway, at the bell was 2nd- beaten 1.5 m by Royalty Beer (1:57.20) in HCP on March 30 at $7.10. Finds a few better. Can't recommend.
